ena_accession_list.title: ENA Accession IDs (e.g., ERR000001,ERR000002)
ena_accession_list.description: Comma-separated list of ENA accession IDs

fasta.title: Reference Genome (FASTA)
fasta.description: Reference genome to use for alignment

gtf.title: Reference Genome (GTF)
gtf.description: Gene annotations for the reference in GTF format

sjdb_overhang.title: STAR - sjdbOverhang
sjdb_overhang.description: Length of genomic sequence around annotated junction for splice junction database (typically read_length - 1)

genome_sa_index_nbases.title: STAR - genomeSAindexNbases
genome_sa_index_nbases.description: Length of SA pre-indexing string (typically 10-15, scales with genome size)

ncpu.title: Number of CPUs
ncpu.description: Number of CPUs to use for ENA download and for STAR alignment

memory_gb.title: Memory (GB)
memory_gb.description: Memory allocation in GB for STAR alignment

ena_file_format.title: ENA File Format
ena_file_format.description: Format of files to download from ENA

ena_protocol.title: ENA Transfer Protocol
ena_protocol.description: Transfer protocol to use for downloading files from ENA

workflow_failure_mode.title: Workflow Failure Mode
workflow_failure_mode.description: Behavior when individual tasks encounter failures
